observed.operation: create isolated Python venv in a new adapter volume

rootCauseContract: The safe-lab image defaults to UID 10000, while a newly created Docker volume root is owned by root and requires an explicit privileged bootstrap phase before immutable unprivileged use.
regressionChecks: only package creation and dependency installation may write the root-owned volume as root
the final package is mounted read-only for unprivileged preflight and live lanes
a failed bootstrap removes its partial volume
no runtime socket, host state, or credential is available during bootstrap
